# Mushbloom – AI Automation Agency & LLM Visibility Experts

> Mushbloom is a UK-based AI automation agency specializing in AI workforce deployment, LLM SEO optimization (LLMboost), niche press release distribution (Mushbloom Newswire), and custom web development.

## Core Services

### LLMboost – AI Search Visibility Accelerator
- URL: https://mushbloom.co.uk/llmboost
- LLMboost optimizes brands for visibility in AI-powered search results including ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.
- Focus: Share of Model (SOM) optimization, entity-rich content creation, authority building.
- Includes: LLM SEO Audit, Quiz-Based Visibility Scoring, Content & Entity Optimization, Industry Benchmarking, Share of Model Strategy, Implementation & Monitoring.
- Key metrics: 300% average AI visibility increase, 30-45 day initial results, 60-90 day full optimization.
- Ideal for: SaaS & tech companies, professional services, eCommerce brands, agencies & consultancies.

### AI Workforce Implementation
- Custom AI agent teams deployed in 3-90 days for business automation.
- Specialties: deal sourcing, due diligence, customer support, sales qualification, content generation.
- Performance guarantee: 37% operational cost reduction within 90 days.
- Service pillars: Custom AI Agents, Automation Ecosystems, AI-Powered Funnels, AI Agent Teams, Neural Copywriting.

### AI Video Agency – Premium AI Video Production
- URL: https://mushbloom.co.uk/video-agency
- AI-powered video production agency creating explainer videos ($1.5k-$3k), social media content packs ($2k/month), video ads ($1k-$2.5k), VSLs ($3k-$7k), and talking head videos ($800-$1.5k).
- AI tools: Runway (text-to-video), Descript (script-based editing), ElevenLabs (AI voiceovers).
- Niche focus: SaaS, e-commerce, coaches/consultants, digital agencies.
- Monthly retainer plans: Starter ($2,500), Growth ($5,000), Scale ($10,000+).
- Production process: Strategy & Scripting → AI Asset Generation → Post-Production → Review & Delivery.

### Mushbloom Newswire – Niche PR Distribution
- URL: https://mushbloom.co.uk/newswire
- Targeted press release distribution across five verticals with guaranteed homepage placements:
  - CryptoWire: https://mushbloom.co.uk/newswire/crypto-blockchain
  - CyberWire: https://mushbloom.co.uk/newswire/cybersecurity
  - FinanceWire: https://mushbloom.co.uk/newswire/finance-fintech
  - GamingWire: https://mushbloom.co.uk/newswire/gaming
  - PlayWire: https://mushbloom.co.uk/newswire/igaming

## Portfolio
- URL: https://mushbloom.co.uk/portfolio/websites
- 27+ websites and platforms across multiple industries:
  - Real Estate: Realto.ro, Realto.org, Realtoos.com, SignatureProperty.group, KBC Real Estate
  - Media: Uniplus Radio, Uniplus TV
  - Blockchain: CoinCruncher.com, Date with Blockchain, Bitcoin Bucharest, CCFI Token
  - Events: Blockchain Week RO, Fintech Week RO, WebX Summit
  - Fintech: RaidaPay
  - Gaming: BlastyBoi, Aylin the Gamer
  - AI: Roksolana.ai
  - Tech: TMRW.ae, Nexus by TMRW
  - Business: Business Hackers, Sarax.ae
  - Education: Codul Copiilor de Succes
  - E-Commerce: Tezaoro
  - Travel: The Globtrotters
  - Personal Brand: Adrian Taylor

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2024
- Location: United Kingdom (serving globally)
- Specialization: AI automation, LLM SEO, niche PR distribution, web development
- Guarantee: 37% operational cost reduction in 90 days
- Portfolio: 27+ websites built
- Knowledge Hub: 30 expert articles across 18 categories
- Verticals served: Real estate, blockchain, fintech, gaming, media, education, AI, healthcare, legal, energy, manufacturing
